symbols: angel appearing — divine message entering ordinary life
Mary at prayer — humble setting of the greatest event
description: A Tissot watercolor in his characteristic Orientalist style depicting the Annunciation with attention to realistic Middle Eastern domestic setting and archaeological detail, part of his exhaustive Life of Christ series.
theological_description: Tissot emphasizes the historical reality of the Incarnation. Gabriel's message (LUK.1.26-38) occurs in a humble Galilean home. 'The Holy Spirit will come upon you, and the power of the Most High will overshadow you' (LUK.1.35). Mary's fiat — 'let it be to me according to your word' (LUK.1.38) — is the hinge of salvation history.
